name: Koga Narushima
description: A young man who wishes to enter the underground fighting scene in order to attain greater fighting strength. He has some history with Tokita Ohma.

name: Kosuzu Motoori
description: Kosuzu Motoori is a carefree human girl living at Human village and working at the Suzunaan book renter. She has just recently gained the ability to dechipher all books by just touching them. She uses this ability for reading youkai books, not caring much about their dangerous nature. Kosuzu is shown to be acquaintances with Reimu Hakurei, Marisa Kirisame and Hieda no Akyuu. name: Kotone Noda
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Kotone is a student at Misato West High School and comes from a rich family. She gave [Haruka](https://anilist.co/character/86385/Haruka-Takayama) the nickname "Harupoppo".

name: Lakyus Alvein Dale Aindra

She acts as a faith based magic caster and warrior priestess of her adventurer group. She is described as a young women that has long blonde hair with green eyes and pink lips that showed a healthy gleam. Her beauty falls short of Renner but overflows with a different charm. name: Maekawa
description: __Height:__ 179.9 cm Maekawa is another classmate of Makoto's who is quite tall, always referring to Makoto as 'transfer student' as she can never get his actual name right. She gets dizzy if she raises her arms over her head for more than ten seconds, and often wears various costumes. She has a cool demeanor and sometimes amuses herself by teasing Ryūko. name: Mai Sawaguchi
description: A very responsible second year high school student who often takes care of her siblings at home. Mai has a streak of tomboy which shows up occasionally.

name: Makoto Oono
description: __Appearance:__ Makoto is a college student who almost looks like her younger sister Akira, except her hair is a bit more curly, and her face is very similar to Akira’s. __Personality:__ She is like the polar opposite of Akira. She's loquacious, carefree, and a little bit of a tomboy. She makes it no secret that she dislikes the parenting of her family and frequently runs away from Gōda Moemi, to the point that Moemi decides to give up on Makoto.

name: Mikura Suzuki
description: Mikura is strong, highly proficient at fighting and using firearms. She is determined, strong willed and can be a cold blooded killer if the situation requires her to be one. She is very competitive and unsociable, but she has a kind soul deep down. In addition to her aggressive fighting styles and love of karaoke, she has a precognitive ability that allows her to see short glimpses of future.

name: Minako Sanada
description: __Height:__ 162cm __Weight:__ 61kg __Family structure:__ Father, Mother (Divorced), Big sister, Minako, Cat __Likes:__ Cute things, accessories, shopping, black tea, baths __Dislikes:__ Gross things, horror films, people who don't listen

name: Minami no Yuusha
description: The Hero of the South is a Hero who fought on the front lines against the demons for mankind before Himmel met Frieren. He was said to be mankind's strongest.

name: Miyoko Houjou
description: A 92nd Totsuki Generation student. She is also the heiress to her family restaurant.

name: Murasaki
description: Murasaki is Nice's empathetic partner at the Hamatora detective agency.

name: Noir Fochrosé
nativeName: ノアール・フォシュローゼ
description: A noble girl who resides in the town of Crimonia. Her father is the Feudal Lord of Crimonia and together they live in a mansion located there, while Noir's mother and sister live together at the Capital City. Noir has a slightly spoiled and prideful attitude, although not to the point of it being offensive but rather cute and childish. She doesn't seem to mind associating with people outside her social class to a certain degree and became friends with Fina even with their social status differenc
searchTerms: ノアール・フォシュローゼ

name: Noriko Aoi
description: The mother of [Ashito](https://anilist.co/character/133818/Ashito--Aoi) and [Shun](https://anilist.co/character/239920/Shun-Aoi), and the owner of the family's store. She currently resides in Ehime with Shun while Ashito is away in Tokyo.

name: Rinne Amagane
description: The main character in our story. She just moved to a new town, and was excited to start her first day at the new school. Unfortunately, she got hit by a truck and ended up in Hell. Now she's trying to make friends there, and find her way home.

name: Rosti Naumann
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") A skilled magical artificer and Will's roommate. His boundless affection for Will is enough to make Colette nervous. While lacking any natural gift for artificing, he has become a great talent and often devises various magical items under the pretense of making them for Will.

name: Sadaijin
description: ~!Like Daijin, Sadaijin is a god-like divine beast in the form of a cat.!~ ~!The eastern keystone responsible for holding back the worms from escaping open doors in abandoned places.!~

name: Sana Kashimura
description: A girl with the ability to teleport and create anything she can imagine, Sana was being studied at a secret research facility until she decided to escape. She eventually crosses pass with Zouroku, who decides to take her in.
